title: Mediterranean Stir Fry
description: A delicious and quick stir fry recipe combining the flavors of the Mediterranean with the simplicity of a stir fry.

ingredients.name: Mediterranean vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, zucchini, and tomatoes

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat in a large skillet.
Add minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the Mediterranean vegetables and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Add the olives and stir-fry for another minute.
Pour in the rich stir sauce and stir well.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
